Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 - Search Slack #engineering (C003) for messages about the invoice attachment safety ticket and the Sunbelt/Palmetto incident. Discovers Samira Tariq's message (TS: 1776345000) explicitly stating the attachment-mismatch safeguard ticket opened after the Terraform pricing leak is still sitting in backlog with no owner and no production stopgap, that it was pushed on April 6 for DOT work tied to Raj Patel, and that this is now the second pricing-exposure incident touching the same failure mode. Also discovers Lena Bjorkstrom's message (TS: 1775520600) about deferring the ticket again for DOT compliance, leaving it unassigned. Tool: conversations_search_messages with search_query "invoice safety" or "attachment mismatch" or "invoice template", filter_in_channel C003.
OE 2 - Search Slack #finance (C005) for messages about the Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap. Discovers Marcus Thorne's analysis (TS: 1776337800) comparing Hana's send log to QuickBooks, confirming that Sunbelt received Palmetto's nonprofit-rate PDF and Palmetto received Sunbelt's commercial-rate PDF, framing it as revenue-leak plus compliance risk. Also discovers Hana Kim's message (TS: 1775881020) noting the Sunbelt and Palmetto invoices went out back-to-back. Tool: conversations_search_messages with search_query "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "invoice swap", filter_in_channel C005.
OE 3 - Search emails for the Sunbelt invoice complaints. Discovers emails from Raj Greenfield (raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com) to Emeka Diallo questioning invoice INV-2026-0398 because the attached PDF shows $2,400 with a Palmetto Community Foundation header instead of Sunbelt's expected $4,800. Raj escalated to David Chen after Emeka did not respond promptly. Tool: search_emails with query "Sunbelt" or "INV-2026-0398" or "Raj Greenfield".
OE 4 - Search emails for the Palmetto invoice complaints. Discovers emails from Carmen Delgado-Reyes (carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org) to Emeka Diallo noting invoice INV-2026-0399 shows $4,800 (approximately double expected), flagging it as an audit risk for their 501(c)(3) nonprofit records with a May 15 documentation deadline. Tool: search_emails with query "Palmetto" or "INV-2026-0399" or "Carmen Delgado".
OE 5 - Search emails for Marcus Thorne's internal analysis of the invoice swap. Discovers Marcus's urgent email to David Chen, Hana Kim, and Emeka Diallo confirming QuickBooks was correct (Sunbelt INV-2026-0398 for $4,800, Palmetto INV-2026-0399 for $2,400) but the PDF attachments were swapped on the April 10 outbound send. Also discovers David Chen's email framing the Sunbelt/Palmetto incident as a repeat pricing-exposure event in the same family as the Terraform reply-all incident. Tool: search_emails with query "invoice mix-up" or "pricing exposure" or "Sunbelt Palmetto".
OE 6 - Search Linear for the invoice attachment safety ticket. Discovers linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 (ENG-187), titled "Invoice email template safety checks — prevent attachment mismatches," state_backlog, assignee moveops_lena_bjorkstrom, priority 2, created 2026-03-18. Description states it is a follow-up safeguard after the Terraform pricing leak incident, with four requested safeguards: (1) validate invoice number in PDF against QuickBooks, (2) warn on customer/recipient mismatch, (3) confirmation for multiple PDFs or filename mismatch, (4) log attachment-to-invoice mapping. Tool: linear_list_issues with query "invoice" or "attachment" or "safety".
OE 7 - Read comments on the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2). Discovers: (a) Lena Bjorkstrom's comment (2026-04-06) deferring the ticket for DOT compliance work tied to Raj Patel, leaving it unassigned; (b) Samira Tariq's acknowledgment (2026-04-06) that DOT work comes first but keeping it in backlog is uncomfortable; (c) Samira's escalation comment (2026-04-15) stating they deprioritized on April 6, left a control gap with no temporary guardrail, and the Sunbelt/Palmetto exposure maps directly to the missing control, asks engineering to treat as incident follow-up, assign an owner, and define fastest shippable stopgap; (d) Marcus Thorne's comment (2026-04-15) flagging the live consequence of leaving the ticket in backlog — confirmed QuickBooks records were correct but invoice PDFs were mismatched between Sunbelt and Palmetto on 2026-04-10, noting both pricing exposure and nonprofit audit risk, and requesting engineering input on whether any attachment-layer safeguard or logging can help verify scope; (e) Marcus Thorne's second comment (2026-04-22) escalating that this is the second pricing-exposure event linked to the unbuilt safeguard, requesting attachment-to-recipient verification. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2".
OE 8 - Search Linear for the Sunbelt/Palmetto reconstruction ticket. Discovers linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130 (ticket #417), titled "Reconstruct Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice attachment exposure and issue corrected documentation," priority 1, assignee moveops_marcus_thorne, due 2026-04-16. Description confirms QuickBooks invoices were correct but emailed PDFs sent on 2026-04-10 were swapped: Sunbelt INV-2026-0398 ($4,800) and Palmetto INV-2026-0399 ($2,400). Tool: linear_list_issues with query "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "reconstruction".
OE 9 - Read comments on the reconstruction ticket (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130). Discovers cross-functional comments: Samira's engineering context noting the dormant safeguard ticket from the Terraform pricing leak was sitting in backlog for three weeks unassigned; David Chen's CE framing as a second April pricing exposure; Marcus's finance remediation plan including corrected documents, Palmetto audit wording, and recommendation to reactivate the invoice email template safety checks ticket. Tool: linear_list_comments with issueId "linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130".
OE 10 - Search emails for the Terraform pricing leak context to understand the original incident that prompted the safety ticket. Discovers the Terraform Digital reply-all incident where Catalina Dubois accidentally Reply-All'd internal pricing strategy to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform Digital, exposing MoveOps' volume discount modeling. Tool: search_emails with query "Terraform" or "pricing leak" or "reply-all".
OE 11 - Search QuickBooks for the Sunbelt invoice to verify the actual financial amounts. Discovers invoice INV-2026-0398 with TotalAmt $4,800, customer Sunbelt Venture Partners (cust_sunbelt), TxnDate 2026-04-10, DueDate 2026-05-10, Balance $4,800. Tool: quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria matching Sunbelt or DocNumber INV-2026-0398.
OE 12 - Search QuickBooks for the Palmetto invoice to verify the actual financial amounts. Discovers invoice INV-2026-0399 with TotalAmt $2,400, customer Palmetto Community Foundation (cust_palmetto), TxnDate 2026-04-10, DueDate 2026-05-10, Balance $2,400, described as nonprofit rate. Tool: quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria matching Palmetto or DocNumber INV-2026-0399.
OE 13 - Search Linear for Dmitri's expense audit ticket (ENG-216) and the stipend duplicate detection ticket (ENG-220). Discovers: (a) issue_audit_expenses (ENG-216), "[URGENT] Full audit of 47 auto-processed pilot expenses," state_in_progress, assignee moveops_dmitri_volkov, priority 0 (urgent); (b) issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220), "Stipend duplicate detection — receipt hash fingerprinting & PDF metadata similarity scoring," state_todo, assignee moveops_dmitri_volkov, priority 1. Tool: linear_list_issues with query "audit" or "stipend" or "duplicate".
OE 14 - Search Airtable Stipend Transactions table (tblStipends00001) for records flagged during Dmitri's audit. Discovers three flagged records: (a) rec_stipend_kevin_tran_keyboard, Kevin Tran, Vectral Systems, Ergonomic Keyboard, $89, Approval Status "Approved," Review Notes contain audit flag "Duplicate Hash" and note the submission was auto-approved and paid out on 2026-03-08 (payment confirmed in QuickBooks OE 15); (b) rec_stipend_andre_keyboard, Andre Washington, Mosaic Robotics, Ergonomic Keyboard, $89, Approval Status "Pending Approval," Approved Amount $0, Review Notes contain audit flag "Duplicate Hash," identical receipt hash to Kevin Tran's; (c) rec_stipend_jordan_monitor_stand, Jordan Ekwueme, BrightLoop Analytics, Monitor Stand, $45, Approval Status "Pending Approval," Approved Amount $0, Review Notes contain audit flag "PDF Template Match," same TechComfort Supply template TC-RECEIPT-STD-041. Tool: airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Stipend Transactions", field_name "Review Notes", value "Duplicate Hash" (returns Kevin Tran and Andre Washington records); repeat with field_name "Review Notes", value "PDF Template Match" (returns Jordan Ekwueme record). Alternatively, use airtable_list_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Stipend Transactions" to scan all stipend records and filter for audit flags.
OE 15 - Search QuickBooks bills for the stipend payment holds placed by Marcus Thorne. Discovers: (a) bill_stipend_tran_keyboard (STIP-2026-0089), Kevin Tran, $89, Balance $0 (already paid, Billable to Vectral); (b) bill_stipend_washington_keyboard_hold (STIP-2026-0094), Andre Washington, $89, admin hold placed 2026-03-15 by Marcus Thorne, NotBillable, pending HR verification; (c) bill_stipend_ekwueme_monitor_hold (STIP-2026-0097), Jordan Ekwueme, $45, admin hold placed 2026-03-15 by Marcus Thorne, NotBillable, pending HR verification. Total exposure in limbo: $134 ($89 + $45). Tool: quickbooks_search_bills with criteria matching "stipend" or "STIP-2026".
OE 16 - Look up Anh Nguyen's current type validation ticket (ENG-218) to confirm sprint capacity context. Discovers issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218), "Dashboard: Add type validation to policy config editor," state_in_progress, assignee moveops_anh_nguyen, priority 2. Tool: linear_list_issues with assignee "moveops_anh_nguyen" or query "type validation".
OE 17 - Look up Samira Tariq's contact details to retrieve her email address before sending the email. Discovers samira.tariq@moveops.com, Engineering Manager, contact_id moveops_samira_tariq. Tool: contacts_search_contacts with query "Samira Tariq".
OE 18 - Look up Anh Nguyen's contact details and Linear user ID to correctly assign the new implementation ticket. Discovers anh.nguyen@moveops.com, Software Engineer, contact_id moveops_anh_nguyen. Tool: contacts_search_contacts with query "Anh Nguyen".
OE 19 - Update the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) with a scoping summary based on the actual incidents. The description update should reference both the Terraform reply-all pricing leak (original trigger) and the Sunbelt/Palmetto PDF swap (second incident), confirming the same failure mode: no recipient-to-document validation in the invoice email flow. Should note the ticket was deprioritized April 6 for DOT compliance, the Sunbelt/Palmetto swap occurred April 10 without any stopgap, and that Samira and Marcus have both escalated for an owner and implementation. Tool: linear_update_issue with id "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", description containing the scoping summary.
OE 20 - Add a comment to the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) laying out the technical requirements based on the actual incidents. The comment should cover: (1) recipient-to-document validation, match outbound PDF invoice number/customer header against QuickBooks record and recipient email domain; (2) pre-send filename/customer-name mismatch warning; (3) hard block in the mailer when account name and attached invoice disagree; (4) attachment-to-invoice audit log for all batch sends; (5) consider second-person confirmation for batch invoice sends as interim stopgap. Should reference the four original requirements from the ticket description and the gaps identified by Samira and Marcus in their comments. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", body containing the technical requirements.
OE 21 - Create a new Linear implementation ticket for the invoice attachment validation fix and assign it to Anh Nguyen. The ticket should reference the safety ticket (ENG-187) as parent context, be assigned to moveops_anh_nguyen, set on team_engineering, include a description scoping the implementation work (recipient-to-PDF validation, mismatch warning, audit logging), and reference both the Terraform and Sunbelt/Palmetto incidents as requirements drivers. Tool: linear_create_issue with team "team_engineering", title relating to invoice attachment validation implementation, assignee "moveops_anh_nguyen", description with implementation scope.
OE 22 - Post a summary message in #engineering (C003) covering: the scoping findings for the invoice safety ticket (both incidents, Terraform reply-all and Sunbelt/Palmetto PDF swap, are the same failure mode), the technical requirements identified, the new implementation ticket created and assigned to Anh, and the status of the flagged stipend records from Dmitri's audit (Kevin Tran $89 already paid, Andre Washington $89 and Jordan Ekwueme $45 on admin hold pending HR verification). Tool: conversations_add_message with channel_id "C003", payload containing the summary.
OE 23 - Send an email to Samira Tariq (samira.tariq@moveops.com) from Anh Nguyen (anh.nguyen@moveops.com) with the full context before sprint planning. The email should cover: (a) the invoice safety ticket scoping, both incidents confirm the same failure mode, technical requirements identified, new implementation ticket created; (b) the stipend audit status, 3 records flagged, Kevin Tran's $89 already paid out, Andre Washington's $89 and Jordan Ekwueme's $45 on admin hold, total $134 in limbo; (c) sprint capacity context, ENG-218 type validation wrapping up, ready to take on the invoice safety implementation. Tool: send_email with sender "anh.nguyen@moveops.com", recipients ["samira.tariq@moveops.com"], subject relating to invoice safety ticket scoping and sprint planning context, content covering all findings.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 14 - Search Airtable Stipend Transactions table (tblStipends00001) for records flagged during Dmitri's audit. Discovers three flagged records: (a) rec_stipend_kevin_tran_keyboard, Kevin Tran, Vectral Systems, Ergonomic Keyboard, $89, Approval Status "Approved," Review Notes contain audit flag "Duplicate Hash" and note the submission was auto-approved and paid out on 2026-03-08 (payment confirmed in QuickBooks OE 15); (b) rec_stipend_andre_keyboard, Andre Washington, Mosaic Robotics, Ergonomic Keyboard, $89, Approval Status "Pending Approval," Approved Amount $0, Review Notes contain audit flag "Duplicate Hash," identical receipt hash to Kevin Tran's; (c) rec_stipend_jordan_monitor_stand, Jordan Ekwueme, BrightLoop Analytics, Monitor Stand, $45, Approval Status "Pending Approval," Approved Amount $0, Review Notes contain audit flag "PDF Template Match," same TechComfort Supply template TC-RECEIPT-STD-041. Tool: airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Stipend Transactions", field_name "Review Notes", value "Duplicate Hash" (returns Kevin Tran and Andre Washington records); repeat with field_name "Review Notes", value "PDF Template Match" (returns Jordan Ekwueme record). Alternatively, use airtable_list_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Stipend Transactions" to scan all stipend records and filter for audit flags.
OE 15 - Search QuickBooks bills for the stipend payment holds placed by Marcus Thorne. Discovers: (a) bill_stipend_tran_keyboard (STIP-2026-0089), Kevin Tran, $89, Balance $0 (already paid, Billable to Vectral); (b) bill_stipend_washington_keyboard_hold (STIP-2026-0094), Andre Washington, $89, admin hold placed 2026-03-15 by Marcus Thorne, NotBillable, pending HR verification; (c) bill_stipend_ekwueme_monitor_hold (STIP-2026-0097), Jordan Ekwueme, $45, admin hold placed 2026-03-15 by Marcus Thorne, NotBillable, pending HR verification. Total exposure in limbo: $134 ($89 + $45). Tool: quickbooks_search_bills with criteria matching "stipend" or "STIP-2026".
OE 16 - Look up Anh Nguyen's current type validation ticket (ENG-218) to confirm sprint capacity context. Discovers issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218), "Dashboard: Add type validation to policy config editor," state_in_progress, assignee moveops_anh_nguyen, priority 2. Tool: linear_list_issues with assignee "moveops_anh_nguyen" or query "type validation".
OE 17 - Look up Samira Tariq's contact details to retrieve her email address before sending the email. Discovers samira.tariq@moveops.com, Engineering Manager, contact_id moveops_samira_tariq. Tool: contacts_search_contacts with query "Samira Tariq".
OE 18 - Look up Anh Nguyen's contact details and Linear user ID to correctly assign the new implementation ticket. Discovers anh.nguyen@moveops.com, Software Engineer, contact_id moveops_anh_nguyen. Tool: contacts_search_contacts with query "Anh Nguyen".
OE 19 - Update the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) with a scoping summary based on the actual incidents. The description update should reference both the Terraform reply-all pricing leak (original trigger) and the Sunbelt/Palmetto PDF swap (second incident), confirming the same failure mode: no recipient-to-document validation in the invoice email flow. Should note the ticket was deprioritized April 6 for DOT compliance, the Sunbelt/Palmetto swap occurred April 10 without any stopgap, and that Samira and Marcus have both escalated for an owner and implementation. Tool: linear_update_issue with id "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", description containing the scoping summary.
OE 20 - Add a comment to the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) laying out the technical requirements based on the actual incidents. The comment should cover: (1) recipient-to-document validation, match outbound PDF invoice number/customer header against QuickBooks record and recipient email domain; (2) pre-send filename/customer-name mismatch warning; (3) hard block in the mailer when account name and attached invoice disagree; (4) attachment-to-invoice audit log for all batch sends; (5) consider second-person confirmation for batch invoice sends as interim stopgap. Should reference the four original requirements from the ticket description and the gaps identified by Samira and Marcus in their comments. Tool: linear_create_comment with issueId "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", body containing the technical requirements.
OE 21 - Create a new Linear implementation ticket for the invoice attachment validation fix and assign it to Anh Nguyen. The ticket should reference the safety ticket (ENG-187) as parent context, be assigned to moveops_anh_nguyen, set on team_engineering, include a description scoping the implementation work (recipient-to-PDF validation, mismatch warning, audit logging), and reference both the Terraform and Sunbelt/Palmetto incidents as requirements drivers. Tool: linear_create_issue with team "team_engineering", title relating to invoice attachment validation implementation, assignee "moveops_anh_nguyen", description with implementation scope.
OE 22 - Post a summary message in #engineering (C003) covering: the scoping findings for the invoice safety ticket (both incidents, Terraform reply-all and Sunbelt/Palmetto PDF swap, are the same failure mode), the technical requirements identified, the new implementation ticket created and assigned to Anh, and the status of the flagged stipend records from Dmitri's audit (Kevin Tran $89 already paid, Andre Washington $89 and Jordan Ekwueme $45 on admin hold pending HR verification). Tool: conversations_add_message with channel_id "C003", payload containing the summary.
OE 23 - Send an email to Samira Tariq (samira.tariq@moveops.com) from Anh Nguyen (anh.nguyen@moveops.com) with the full context before sprint planning. The email should cover: (a) the invoice safety ticket scoping, both incidents confirm the same failure mode, technical requirements identified, new implementation ticket created; (b) the stipend audit status, 3 records flagged, Kevin Tran's $89 already paid out, Andre Washington's $89 and Jordan Ekwueme's $45 on admin hold, total $134 in limbo; (c) sprint capacity context, ENG-218 type validation wrapping up, ready to take on the invoice safety implementation. Tool: send_email with sender "anh.nguyen@moveops.com", recipients ["samira.tariq@moveops.com"], subject relating to invoice safety ticket scoping and sprint planning context, content covering all findings.
